build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 30, 3)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(4).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature for bolt holes — .workplane(offset=3).rect(18, 18).extrude(2)
STEP 4: Create bolt hole circles — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, -15).circle(2).cutThruAll()
STEP 5: Add second set of bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(20, -15).circle(2).cutThruAll()
STEP 6: Add third set of bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, 15).circle(2).cutThruAll()
STEP 7: Add fourth set of bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(20, 15).circle(2).cutThruAll()
